data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the acceptance workflow for substitutes, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or operates as required. The linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, but the evidence does not demonstrate that substitutes can accept or decline offers, indicating a clear gap in the requirement. The absence of any related API reads or persisted state checks further supports this conclusion.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow for substitutes to accept or decline offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
